text:
おなじみのスーパーハード以上の
エネミー討伐任務がきたぜ……

ラスベガスは
変わったエネミーが多いし
苦戦しそ……

……い、いや、面倒くさそうで
やる気でねーな！
いや、本当に面倒くせーわ！

てなわけで、おたくのお手本を参考に
さっくり終わらせてーなと
思

We've got a suppression assignment for
enemies in the good ol' Super Hard
and up category.

Las Vegas has so many messed-up enemies...
This is gonna be brutal.

*cough* Brutally boring, I mean! What a
snoozefest, am I right? Since when are they
sendin' us out to do busy work?

So, since we both just wanna get this chore
over with, you mind showin' me the quickest
way to get this done?
